title: Extra tools beyond spec: data_summary and biggest_wins provide additional query surface
evidence: ToolSchemas.java:104-118 defines data_summary and biggest_wins tools not explicitly required by TASK.md
suggestion: No action needed; these enrich the MCP server beyond the minimum spec

title: Robust cross-dataset deduplication via authoritative-source selection
evidence: KnowledgeBase.java:73-89 selectAuthoritativeSources() picks one source per (competition, season) to avoid double-counting overlapping CSV files
suggestion: No action needed; this correctly handles the five overlapping match datasets

title: BDD-style test naming with @DisplayName annotations mirrors spec's Gherkin scenarios
evidence: All 8 test classes use @DisplayName with Given/When/Then format, e.g. MatchQueryTest.java:32
suggestion: No action needed; aligns well with the spec's testing approach
